---
title: "Supplementary Figure 4 â€” GLP1R/Lepr-KO and AgRP-KO supporting analyses"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r setup_libraries_data}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(targets)
library(edgeR)
library(limma)
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggridges)
library(patchwork)
library(magrittr)
library(MASS)
library(janitor)

source(here::here("R/basic_processing.R"))
source(here::here("R/analysis_wrappers.R"))
source(here::here("R/helper_functions.R"))

fig_path_s4 <- here::here("output_figures/paper/figure4/supp/")
tab_path_s4 <- here::here("output_figures/paper/figure4/supp/tables/")
dir.create(fig_path_s4, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(tab_path_s4, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

BASE_SIZE <- 8
geno_cols <- c("mut" = "#C0392B", "wt" = "grey70")
diet_cols <- c("DIO" = "#E8682F", "Chow" = "#F0AD74", "Fast" = "#165C5B")

# LGS genes derived from MINT sPLS-DA (see paper/lgs.Rmd)
lgs_genes <- read.csv(here::here("output_figures/paper/lgs/lgs_genes.csv"))
leptin_geneset <- lgs_genes$gene[lgs_genes$value.var < 0]

targets::tar_config_set(store = here::here("_targets"))
targets::tar_load(arc_diet_labeled)
targets::tar_load(arc_agrpko_labeled)
targets::tar_load(arc_glp1rko_labeled)
targets::tar_load(agrpko_celldist)
targets::tar_load(glp1rko_celldist)
targets::tar_load(pb_glp1rko)
targets::tar_load(celltypes_glp1rko)
names(pb_glp1rko) <- celltypes_glp1rko
targets::tar_load(pb_agrpko)
targets::tar_load(celltypes_agrpko)
names(pb_agrpko) <- celltypes_agrpko

DefaultAssay(arc_diet_labeled) <- "RNA"
lepr_exp <- AverageExpression(arc_diet_labeled, features = "Lepr", group.by = "seurat_clusters")
lepclus  <- names(as.data.frame(lepr_exp$RNA))[which(lepr_exp$RNA > 1)]
lepclus  <- lepclus[-5]
```

## Extended Data 5a â€” UMAPs of KO animals by cell type and genotype

```{r supp_umaps}
agrpko_umap <- DimPlot(arc_agrpko_labeled, group.by = "predicted.celltype",
                       shuffle = TRUE, raster = TRUE, reduction = "ref.umap",
                       label = TRUE, label.size = 2.5) +
    theme_void() + NoLegend() + theme(plot.title = element_blank())

agrpko_geno <- DimPlot(arc_agrpko_labeled, group.by = "geno", cols = geno_cols,
                       raster = TRUE, shuffle = TRUE, reduction = "ref.umap") +
    theme_void() + theme(plot.title = element_blank(),
                         legend.text = element_text(size = BASE_SIZE))

glp1rko_umap <- DimPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, group.by = "predicted.celltype",
                        shuffle = TRUE, raster = TRUE, reduction = "ref.umap",
                        label = TRUE, label.size = 2.5) +
    theme_void() + NoLegend() + theme(plot.title = element_blank())

glp1rko_geno <- DimPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, group.by = "geno", cols = geno_cols,
                        raster = TRUE, shuffle = TRUE, reduction = "ref.umap") +
    theme_void() + theme(plot.title = element_blank(),
                         legend.text = element_text(size = BASE_SIZE))

(agrpko_umap + glp1rko_umap) / (agrpko_geno + glp1rko_geno)
ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_ko_umaps.pdf"), h = 8, w = 12)
```

## Supp â€” LGS in AgRP neurons (AgRP-KO dataset)

```{r supp_lgs_agrpko}
DefaultAssay(arc_agrpko_labeled) <- "RNA"
arc_agrpko_labeled@meta.data <- arc_agrpko_labeled@meta.data[,
    !grepl("Cluster", colnames(arc_agrpko_labeled@meta.data))]
arc_agrpko_labeled <- AddModuleScore(arc_agrpko_labeled, features = list(leptin_geneset))

lgs_agrpko <- arc_agrpko_labeled[[]] %>%
    dplyr::select(geno, diet, predicted.celltype, hash.mcl.ID, hash_pool, sex, starts_with("Cluster")) %>%
    filter(predicted.celltype == "Agrp") %>%
    group_by(geno, diet, hash.mcl.ID, hash_pool, sex) %>%
    summarise(mean_lgs = mean(Cluster1), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(geno = factor(geno, c("wt", "mut")),
           diet = factor(diet, c("Chow", "DIO")))

mod_agrpko_lgs <- lm(mean_lgs ~ geno * diet + sex, data = lgs_agrpko)
emm_agrpko_lgs <- emmeans::emmeans(mod_agrpko_lgs, pairwise ~ geno | diet)$contrasts %>%
    data.frame() %>% mutate(padj = p.adjust(p.value, "BH"))
write_csv(emm_agrpko_lgs, paste0(tab_path_s4, "lgs_agrpko_stats.csv"))

p_lgs_agrpko <- ggplot(lgs_agrpko, aes(geno, mean_lgs, fill = geno)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6, linewidth = 0.35) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5, shape = 16) +
    facet_wrap(~ diet, nrow = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = geno_cols) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    cowplot::panel_border() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "none", strip.background = element_blank()) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Leptin gene signature")

ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_lgs_agrpko.pdf"), plot = p_lgs_agrpko, h = 3.5, w = 4)
```

## Supp â€” LGS in Lepr/Glp1r neurons (GLP1R-KO, cluster 12 only)

```{r supp_lgs_glp1rko_clus12}
DefaultAssay(arc_glp1rko_labeled) <- "RNA"
arc_glp1rko_labeled@meta.data <- arc_glp1rko_labeled@meta.data[,
    !grepl("Cluster", colnames(arc_glp1rko_labeled@meta.data))]
arc_glp1rko_labeled <- AddModuleScore(arc_glp1rko_labeled, features = list(leptin_geneset))

lgs_glp1rko <- arc_glp1rko_labeled[[]] %>%
    dplyr::select(geno, diet, predicted.celltype, hash.mcl.ID, hash_pool, sex, starts_with("Cluster")) %>%
    filter(predicted.celltype == "12") %>%
    group_by(geno, diet, hash.mcl.ID, hash_pool, sex) %>%
    summarise(mean_lgs = mean(Cluster1), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(geno = factor(geno, c("wt", "mut")),
           diet = factor(diet, c("Chow", "DIO")))

mod_glp1rko_lgs <- lm(mean_lgs ~ geno * diet + sex, data = lgs_glp1rko)
emm_glp1rko_lgs <- emmeans::emmeans(mod_glp1rko_lgs, pairwise ~ geno | diet)$contrasts %>%
    data.frame() %>% mutate(padj = p.adjust(p.value, "BH"))
write_csv(emm_glp1rko_lgs, paste0(tab_path_s4, "lgs_glp1rko_clus12_stats.csv"))

p_lgs_glp1rko <- ggplot(lgs_glp1rko, aes(geno, mean_lgs, fill = geno)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6, linewidth = 0.35) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.5, shape = 16) +
    facet_wrap(~ diet, nrow = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = geno_cols) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    cowplot::panel_border() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "none", strip.background = element_blank()) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Leptin gene signature")

ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_lgs_glp1rko_clus12.pdf"), plot = p_lgs_glp1rko, h = 3.5, w = 4)
```

## Supp â€” scDist: KO vs WT cell distance by diet (DIO and Chow)

```{r supp_scdist}
glp1r_dat <- glp1rko_celldist$results %>%
    janitor::clean_names() %>% rownames_to_column("group") %>%
    separate(group, into = c("clus", "diet")) %>%
    mutate(padj = p.adjust(p_val, "BH"), ko = "GLP1R/Lepr-KO")

agrp_dat <- agrpko_celldist$results %>%
    janitor::clean_names() %>% rownames_to_column("group") %>%
    separate(group, into = c("clus", "diet")) %>%
    mutate(padj = p.adjust(p_val, "BH"), ko = "AgRP-KO")

make_scdist_scatter <- function(dat) {
    dio_df  <- dat %>% filter(diet == "DIO")  %>%
        dplyr::select(clus, dist, x95_percent_ci_low, x95_percent_ci_upper, padj)
    chow_df <- dat %>% filter(diet == "Chow") %>%
        dplyr::select(clus, dist, x95_percent_ci_low, x95_percent_ci_upper, padj)
    merged  <- merge(dio_df, chow_df, by = "clus", suffixes = c("_dio", "_chow"))
    merged %>%
        mutate(sig = padj_dio < 0.05 | padj_chow < 0.05) %>%
        ggplot(aes(dist_dio, dist_chow,
                   color = I(case_when(
                       padj_dio < 0.05 & padj_chow < 0.05  ~ "#C0392B",
                       padj_dio < 0.05 & padj_chow >= 0.05 ~ "#2C3E50",
                       TRUE ~ "grey80")))) +
        geom_point(size = 2.5) +
        geom_abline(lty = 2, linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey40") +
        ggrepel::geom_text_repel(data = ~ filter(.x, sig), aes(label = clus),
                                  size = 2, max.overlaps = 10,
                                  min.segment.length = 0, segment.size = 0.3) +
        cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
        labs(x = "KO-WT distance (DIO)", y = "KO-WT distance (Chow)")
}

p_glp1r_scdist <- make_scdist_scatter(glp1r_dat)
p_agrp_scdist  <- make_scdist_scatter(agrp_dat)
ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_scdist_glp1rko.pdf"), plot = p_glp1r_scdist, h = 5, w = 5)
ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_scdist_agrpko.pdf"),  plot = p_agrp_scdist,  h = 5, w = 5)
```

## Supp â€” LDA projection: GLP1R-KO cells in diet transcriptional space

```{r supp_lda_glp1rko}
ref_data  <- subset(arc_diet_labeled, subset = treatment %in% c("HFD", "Chow", "Fast"))
ref_subset_lda <- subset(ref_data, subset = seurat_clusters == "12")
new_subset_lda <- subset(arc_glp1rko_labeled, subset = predicted.celltype == "12")
shared_feats   <- intersect(rownames(ref_subset_lda), rownames(new_subset_lda))

ref_subset_lda <- process_seurat(subset(ref_subset_lda, features = shared_feats),
                                  method = "integrate", batch = "hash_pool",
                                  cluster = FALSE, nfeats = 5000)
ref_mat_lda  <- ref_subset_lda@assays$integrated@scale.data
ref_pca_lda  <- prcomp(t(ref_mat_lda), center = TRUE, scale. = FALSE)
lda_model    <- MASS::lda(ref_subset_lda$treatment ~ ., data = data.frame(ref_pca_lda$x)[, 1:10])

new_subset_lda <- NormalizeData(new_subset_lda) %>% ScaleData(features = VariableFeatures(ref_subset_lda))
scale_mat_lda  <- new_subset_lda@assays$RNA@scale.data
scale_mat_lda  <- scale_mat_lda[match(rownames(ref_mat_lda), rownames(scale_mat_lda)), ]
new_pca_lda    <- as.matrix(t(scale_mat_lda)) %*% ref_pca_lda$rotation %>% data.frame()
lda_pred       <- predict(lda_model, new_pca_lda)$x

p_ridge_glp1rko <- lda_pred %>%
    bind_cols(new_subset_lda[[]] %>% dplyr::select(geno, diet)) %>%
    mutate(geno = factor(geno, c("wt", "mut"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(LD1, y = geno, fill = geno)) +
    ggridges::geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 0.9, rel_min_height = 0.02) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = geno_cols) +
    facet_wrap(~ diet, nrow = 1) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    cowplot::panel_border() +
    theme(legend.position = "none", strip.background = element_blank()) +
    labs(x = "Diet transcriptional axis (LD1)", y = NULL)

ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_lda_glp1rko.pdf"), plot = p_ridge_glp1rko, h = 3, w = 7)
```

## Supp â€” LDA projection: AgRP-KO cells in diet transcriptional space

```{r supp_lda_agrpko}
ref_subset_ako <- subset(ref_data, subset = seurat_clusters == "Agrp")
new_subset_ako <- subset(arc_agrpko_labeled, subset = predicted.celltype == "Agrp")
shared_feats   <- intersect(rownames(ref_subset_ako), rownames(new_subset_ako))

ref_subset_ako <- process_seurat(subset(ref_subset_ako, features = shared_feats),
                                  method = "integrate", batch = "hash_pool",
                                  cluster = FALSE, nfeats = 5000)
ref_mat_ako  <- ref_subset_ako@assays$integrated@scale.data
ref_pca_ako  <- prcomp(t(ref_mat_ako), center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE)
lda_model_ako <- MASS::lda(ref_subset_ako$treatment ~ PC1 + PC2, data = data.frame(ref_pca_ako$x))

new_subset_ako <- NormalizeData(new_subset_ako) %>% ScaleData(features = VariableFeatures(ref_subset_ako))
scale_mat_ako  <- new_subset_ako@assays$RNA@scale.data
scale_mat_ako  <- scale_mat_ako[match(rownames(ref_mat_ako), rownames(scale_mat_ako)), ]
new_pca_ako    <- as.matrix(t(scale_mat_ako)) %*% ref_pca_ako$rotation %>% data.frame()
lda_pred_ako   <- predict(lda_model_ako, new_pca_ako)$x

p_ridge_agrpko <- lda_pred_ako %>%
    bind_cols(new_subset_ako[[]] %>% dplyr::select(geno, diet)) %>%
    mutate(geno = factor(geno, c("wt", "mut"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(LD1, y = geno, fill = geno)) +
    ggridges::geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 0.9, rel_min_height = 0.02) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = geno_cols) +
    facet_wrap(~ diet, nrow = 1) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    cowplot::panel_border() +
    theme(legend.position = "none", strip.background = element_blank()) +
    labs(x = "Diet transcriptional axis (LD1)", y = NULL)

ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_lda_agrpko.pdf"), plot = p_ridge_agrpko, h = 3, w = 7)
```

## Supp â€” DE volcano: GLP1R/Lepr-KO vs WT in AgRP neurons

```{r supp_volcano_glp1rko_agrp}
pbd <- pb_glp1rko[["Agrp"]]
pbd$samples$group <- interaction(pbd$samples$geno, pbd$samples$diet)
design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group + sex, data = pbd$samples)
colnames(design) <- gsub(":", "_", colnames(design))
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(voomLmFit(pbd, design),
             makeContrasts(DIO  = groupmut.DIO  - groupwt.DIO,
                           Chow = groupmut.Chow - groupwt.Chow, levels = design)) %>%
    eBayes(robust = FALSE)

glpagrp_chow <- topTable(fit2, n = Inf, coef = "Chow") %>% mutate(sig = adj.P.Val < 0.05)
glpagrp_dio  <- topTable(fit2, n = Inf, coef = "DIO")  %>% mutate(sig = adj.P.Val < 0.05)
write_csv(glpagrp_chow, paste0(tab_path_s4, "glp1rko_agrp_chow_degs.csv"))
write_csv(glpagrp_dio,  paste0(tab_path_s4, "glp1rko_agrp_dio_degs.csv"))

volc_dat  <- bind_rows(glpagrp_chow %>% mutate(comparison = "Chow"),
                       glpagrp_dio  %>% mutate(comparison = "DIO"))
volc_labs <- volc_dat %>% filter(sig) %>% group_by(comparison) %>%
    slice_min(adj.P.Val, n = 10) %>% ungroup()

p_volc <- volc_dat %>%
    ggplot(aes(logFC, -log10(adj.P.Val))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = I(ifelse(sig, "#2C3E50", "grey80"))), shape = 16, size = 0.6) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(data = volc_labs, aes(label = gene), size = 2, max.overlaps = 10,
                              min.segment.length = 0, segment.size = 0.3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), lty = 2, linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey50") +
    facet_wrap(~ comparison, nrow = 1) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) + cowplot::panel_border() +
    theme(strip.background = element_blank()) +
    labs(x = "log2FC (KO - WT)", y = "-log10(adj. p-value)")
ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_volcano_glp1rko_agrp.pdf"), plot = p_volc, h = 5, w = 8)
```

## Supp â€” DE volcano: AgRP-KO vs WT in AgRP neurons

```{r supp_volcano_agrpko_agrp}
pbd <- pb_agrpko[["Agrp"]]
pbd$samples$group <- interaction(pbd$samples$geno, pbd$samples$diet)
design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group + sex, data = pbd$samples)
colnames(design) <- gsub(":", "_", colnames(design))
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(voomLmFit(pbd, design),
             makeContrasts(DIO  = groupmut.DIO  - groupwt.DIO,
                           Chow = groupmut.Chow - groupwt.Chow, levels = design)) %>%
    eBayes(robust = FALSE)

agrpko_chow <- topTable(fit2, n = Inf, coef = "Chow") %>% mutate(sig = adj.P.Val < 0.05)
agrpko_dio  <- topTable(fit2, n = Inf, coef = "DIO")  %>% mutate(sig = adj.P.Val < 0.05)
write_csv(agrpko_chow, paste0(tab_path_s4, "agrpko_agrp_chow_degs.csv"))
write_csv(agrpko_dio,  paste0(tab_path_s4, "agrpko_agrp_dio_degs.csv"))

volc_dat  <- bind_rows(agrpko_chow %>% mutate(comparison = "Chow"),
                       agrpko_dio  %>% mutate(comparison = "DIO"))
volc_labs <- volc_dat %>% filter(sig) %>% group_by(comparison) %>%
    slice_min(adj.P.Val, n = 10) %>% ungroup()

p_volc <- volc_dat %>%
    ggplot(aes(logFC, -log10(adj.P.Val))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = I(ifelse(sig, "#2C3E50", "grey80"))), shape = 16, size = 0.6) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(data = volc_labs, aes(label = gene), size = 2, max.overlaps = 10,
                              min.segment.length = 0, segment.size = 0.3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), lty = 2, linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey50") +
    facet_wrap(~ comparison, nrow = 1) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) + cowplot::panel_border() +
    theme(strip.background = element_blank()) +
    labs(x = "log2FC (KO - WT)", y = "-log10(adj. p-value)")
ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_volcano_agrpko_agrp.pdf"), plot = p_volc, h = 5, w = 8)
```

## Supp â€” Diet gene set module scores in GLP1R-KO AgRP neurons

```{r supp_diet_sets_agrp}
diet_deg_sets <- read.csv(here::here("results/diet_pairwise_deg.csv"))

get_top_bottom_n <- function(df, n = 50) {
    total_rows <- nrow(df)
    df %>% arrange(desc(t)) %>% dplyr::slice(c(1:n, (total_rows - n + 1):total_rows))
}

agrp_sets_df <- diet_deg_sets %>%
    filter(ct == "Agrp") %>%
    group_by(ct, comp) %>%
    do(get_top_bottom_n(., 50)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(set_name = as.character(interaction(ct, comp, sign(logFC))))
agrp_sets <- split(agrp_sets_df$gene, agrp_sets_df$set_name)

agrp_glp1rko <- subset(arc_glp1rko_labeled, subset = predicted.celltype == "Agrp")
agrp_glp1rko@meta.data <- agrp_glp1rko@meta.data[,
    !grepl("Cluster", colnames(agrp_glp1rko@meta.data))]
agrp_glp1rko <- AddModuleScore(agrp_glp1rko, features = agrp_sets, assay = "RNA")

de_set_data <- agrp_glp1rko[[]] %>%
    dplyr::select(geno, diet, hash.mcl.ID, starts_with("Cluster")) %>%
    pivot_longer(starts_with("Cluster"), names_to = "cluster_idx", values_to = "score") %>%
    group_by(geno, diet, hash.mcl.ID, cluster_idx) %>%
    summarise(mean_score = mean(score), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(set_name = names(agrp_sets)[as.integer(gsub("Cluster", "", cluster_idx))],
           geno = factor(geno, c("wt", "mut")),
           diet = factor(diet, c("Chow", "DIO")))

p_diet_sets <- ggplot(de_set_data, aes(x = set_name, y = mean_score, fill = geno)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.35) +
    facet_wrap(~ diet) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = geno_cols) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          strip.background = element_blank()) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Module score")
ggsave(paste0(fig_path_s4, "suppfig4_diet_sets_glp1rko_agrp.pdf"), plot = p_diet_sets, h = 4, w = 7)
```
